scope: Major headings from the big test plan, not every checklist bullet.

items.title: Automated feedback loops
items.notes: Phase 2 wraps the documented lint/build/test commands as verifier leaves.

items.title: Smart contracts
items.status: Hardhat tests run in the automated suites, but verifier does not yet attest each listed contract edge case separately.
items.notes: Phase 5/7 should add security-review attestation and/or finer-grained contract coverage checks.

items.title: SDK / data aggregation
items.sourceSection: 1.2 Component coverage checklist / SDK / data aggregation
items.status: SDK tests run in automated suites; trust/alignment/large-dataset edge-case coverage is not yet mapped to dedicated verifier checks.
items.notes: Keep filling lower-level SDK tests; later split high-value SDK invariants into separate verifier leaves if useful.

items.title: Indexer / chain integration
items.sourceSection: 1.2 Component coverage checklist / Indexer / chain integration
items.status: Full suite includes integration coverage, but replay/resume/duplicates/reset/reorg are not yet represented by dedicated verifier checks.
items.notes: Phase 6 environment checks and later indexer canaries should cover this more directly.

items.title: UI unit/integration tests
items.sourceSection: 1.2 Component coverage checklist / UI unit/integration tests
items.notes: UI Vitest coverage is part of test:fast and test; detailed inventory remains in ui/test-plan.md.

items.title: UI e2e tests
items.sourceSection: 1.2 Component coverage checklist / UI e2e tests
items.notes: Playwright e2e coverage is part of the full suite. IPFS/domain artifact smoke is also available as a separate release-candidate check.

items.title: AI services / generated data
items.sourceSection: 1.2 Component coverage checklist / AI services / generated data
items.status: Seed implication regression is wrapped, but broader adversarial/golden corpora for AI services are not yet represented.
items.notes: Avoid live model calls in ordinary verifier runs; prefer fixture/golden checks.

items.title: Operations / degradation automation
items.sourceSection: 1.2 Component coverage checklist / Operations / degradation automation
items.status: Phase 6 adds manual release-candidate smoke checks for fresh local stack, restart consistency, IPFS/domain artifacts, and configured testnet endpoints. Dedicated degradation canaries for fault injection/wrong-chain behavior are still known gaps.
items.notes: These checks are manual/guarded because they can be slow, restart services, wipe local data, or probe real staging endpoints.

items.title: Environment checklist
items.status: Unit/in-memory and full-suite environments are covered; Phase 6 adds guarded manual checks for fresh local stack, restarted stack, IPFS artifacts, and configured testnet staging.
items.notes: Destructive/restarting/testnet checks require explicit environment-variable opt-ins before doing work.

items.title: Manual / LLM-driven validation roster
items.status: Phase 5 attestation checks verify that selected manual/LLM reports exist, are fresh, and use the required template; they do not run the reviews themselves.
items.notes: Do not mark subjective reviews automated merely because their reports are attested.

items.title: Cross-cutting risks checklist
items.status: Risk ownership is expected to be summarized by security and QA synthesis reports; broader per-risk coverage is still manual judgment.
items.notes: Later coverage checks should make per-risk ownership/freshness more explicit.

items.title: Known automated-test gaps
items.sourceSection: 5. Known automated-test gaps to keep filling
items.status: This section intentionally tracks gaps. The verifier inventory records them without pretending they are covered.
items.notes: Future phases should graduate the highest-value gaps into automated or attestation checks.
